Hero.name: Emil Abdumalikov
Hero.tagline: Software engineering student specializing in cybersecurity — equally at home in x86 assembly and a Next.js frontend, building secure systems and creative software across the stack.

FlagshipProject.heading: Flagship Project
FlagshipProject.intro: My final-year project: a full pipeline from raw AWS logs to actionable incident response.
FlagshipProject.description: C.I.R.A is an automated cloud forensics system that bridges static CSPM monitoring with dynamic incident response. It normalizes large-scale AWS log data into a unified anomaly-detection pipeline and collects evidence in real time via AWS SSM — cutting mean time to resolution for cloud security incidents.

OngoingProjects.intro: A mix of shipped work and things still taking shape.

About.heading: Beyond the Code
About.intro: One engineer, a handful of disciplines that all feed each other.

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.description: My B.Sc. specialization — cryptography, network security, and secure coding practice, with C.I.R.A as the practical output of that focus.

lowLevel.title: Low-Level Systems
lowLevel.description: Comfortable below the abstraction layer — C, C++, and x86 Assembly, with a working understanding of memory management and OS architecture.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullStack.description: From FastAPI backends to Next.js frontends — I've shipped real, deployed products end to end, including a bilingual platform live on Vercel.

music.title: Music — Drums & Guitar
music.description: I teach drums professionally at Yuval Arts, designing curriculums and mentoring students in technique and discipline — the same patience shows up in my engineering.
